issues.comment: The function copies the monitor's config dict and replaces the raw `schedule_type` integer with the human-readable display string, but the return dict uses `monitor_environment.monitor.config` (the unmodified original) instead of the local `config` variable. This means: 1) The `config.copy()` and `schedule_type` substitution are dead code — their result is discarded. 2) The monitor environment context sent in issue occurrence event data will contain the raw integer `schedule_type` instead of the human-readable display value. Fix: Change `"config": monitor_environment.monitor.config` → `"config": config`.
